scripts.test: bun test scripts/deploy-config.test.ts && bun run scripts/test-workspaces.ts
scripts.terraform:fmt: terraform -chdir=infra/bootstrap-iam fmt && terraform -chdir=infra/terraform fmt && terraform -chdir=infra/ecr fmt
scripts.terraform:validate: terraform -chdir=infra/bootstrap-iam validate && terraform -chdir=infra/terraform validate && terraform -chdir=infra/ecr validate
